name: PingOne
description:
Parent attribute for all PingOne attributes
This attribute does not resolve to a value and should not be used in policies.

name: ID
description:
ID of the user the decision request is being made on behalf of
This value is resolved from the userContext.userId property of the decision request.

name: amount
description: The Amount of the request.

SERVICE: RESTFUL; Verb = GET; Content Type: application/json

name: User
description:
Parent attribute for the user the decision request is being made on behalf of
(See PingOne.User.ID for details on how the user is identified from the decision request)
This value is resolved from the userContext.userId property of the decision request.

SERVICE: PingOne Connector; Code = P1_RISK; Schema Version: 1
SERVICE: RESTFUL; Verb = GET; Content Type: application/json
SERVICE: RESTFUL; Verb = POST; Content Type: application/json
SERVICE: RESTFUL; Verb = POST; Content Type: application/json

name: email
description: The user's email address

name: name
description: The user's name (optional)

name: primaryPhone
description: The user's primary phone number, which is optional. This might also match the mobilePhone attribute. This may be explicitly set to null when updating a user to unset it. If provided, it must consist of at least one digit and must not contain more than 32 characters.

name: username
description: The username, which must be provided and must be unique within an environment. The username must be a string of any Unicode letter, mark (e.g. accent, umlaut), math symbol, numeric character, or punctuation. It may have a length of no more than 128 characters.

name: PingOne Protect Create Eval
description: Autogenerated attribute which holds the value resolved from the connector service named `PingOne Protect Create Eval`

serviceSettings.description: SERVICE: RESTFUL; Verb = GET; Content Type: application/json

name: family
description: The family name of the User, or Last in most Western languages (for example, 'Jensen' given the full name 'Ms. Barbara J Jensen, III'). This may be explicitly set to null when updating a name to unset it. Valid characters consists of any Unicode letter, mark (e.g. accent, umlaut), math symbol, numeric character, or punctuation. It may have a length of no more than 256 characters.

name: formatted
description: The fully formatted name of the User (for example 'Ms. Barbara J Jensen, III'). This may be explicitly set to null when updating a name to unset it.

name: given
description: The given name of the User, or First in most Western languages (for example, 'Barbara' given the full name 'Ms. Barbara J Jensen, III'). This may be explicitly set to null when updating a name to unset it. Valid characters consists of any Unicode letter, mark (e.g. accent, umlaut), math symbol, numeric character, or punctuation. It may have a length of no more than 256 characters.
